displayName: Cloud Run OOM — prod-services drept for memory limit

documentation.content:
Cloud Run-container ble drept fordi det forsøkte å bruke mer minne enn limit (OOM-kill). Direkte user-affecting: requests under påvirkning får 500 og containeren restarter. Sjekk Cloud Run-logs for berørt service og revision; vurder å øke memory-limit på Cloud Run-servicen.

Kun prod-services trigger denne alerten — staging OOM under testing skal ikke vekke deg.

conditions.displayName: Memory limit exceeded i prod Cloud Run-log

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND (resource.labels.service_name="main-api" OR resource.labels.service_name="web-api" OR resource.labels.service_name="zipper-service-v2" OR resource.labels.service_name="image-processor-v2" OR resource.labels.service_name="video-processor-v2") AND (textPayload:"Memory limit" OR textPayload:"exceeded its memory limit" OR severity>=ERROR AND textPayload:"OOM")
